code: export const Ai_prompt = "Generate travel plan for location: {Location} also give image of that , for {Days} days  for a {members} , {budget} {currencyType} budget and give me hotels option list with hotel names , hotel  address , price , rating , hotel image url , Geo coordinates , description  and suggest itinerary with place Name , place , details , rating , place image url , Geo coordinates  , ticket pricing , time to travel  each location for {Days} days with each plan with best time to visit in JSON formate ";

sourcesContent: export const Ai_prompt =  "Generate travel plan for location: {Location} also give image of that , for {Days} days  for a {members} , {budget} {currencyType} budget and give me hotels option list with hotel names , hotel  address , price , rating , hotel image url , Geo coordinates , description  and suggest itinerary with place Name , place , details , rating , place image url , Geo coordinates  , ticket pricing , time to travel  each location for {Days} days with each plan with best time to visit in JSON formate "
